name: retool-email
description: MAM email triage — query triaged emails from the Cloudflare Worker / D1 database. Surfaces urgent and follow-up emails, supports search by sender, account, or keyword.
notes: Replaces old retool-email (Postgres). Now talks to the mam-email-triage Cloudflare Worker. Set EMAIL_TRIAGE_KEY env var to the worker's API_KEY secret.
